message:
fix: batch resolve issues #7285-#7310 (runbook, WebSocket, race conditions) (#7359)

* fix: resolve runbook MCP route/payload mismatch and executor reliability (#7285-#7297)

- Fix MCP API route from /api/mcp/ops/call to /api/mcp/tools/ops/call (#7285)
- Fix MCP payload schema from {tool,args} to {name,arguments} (#7286)
- Surface runbook execution failures in AI diagnosis prompt (#7287)
- Write runbook results back to alert details after completion (#7289)
- Replace fixed 3s timer with mission-status-driven phase transitions (#7290)
- Replace fixed 5s repair timer with 60s safety-net timeout (#7291)
- Clear all pending timers on cancel/reset/unmount (#7292)
- Stop subsequent steps when a required evidence step fails (#7293)
- Add AbortSignal support for cancellation of in-flight requests (#7294)
- Add fast-failure error propagation for diagnosis spinner (#7296)
- Add idempotency guard to prevent duplicate diagnosis missions (#7297)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: resolve WebSocket, mission, and deploy race conditions (#7302-#7310)

- Guard HTTP fallback cancel against post-unmount finalization (#7303)
- Prevent duplicate executeMission calls from double-clicks (#7304)
- Guard wsSend retry against post-unmount socket access (#7305)
- Add write mutex to WebSocket client to prevent conn.Close/WriteMessage races (#7306)
- Add polling guard to prevent concurrent deploy poll bursts (#7307)
- Prevent concurrent ensureConnection calls during rapid agent switching (#7308)
- Enforce MAX_COMPLETED_MISSIONS cap on cross-tab mission merge (#7309)
- Check both sessionId and id fields in cancel_ack payload (#7310)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
